title: Actionable Intelligence
description: Intel creates actionable levers: reroute your own routes to match/beat rivals, undercut their prices, legislate to ban their profitable goods, raid their routes with privateers. Espionage is about creating opportunities, not just numeric buffs.
definition-of-done: Intel enables specific actions. Route matching suggestions from intel. Price undercutting calculations. Links to legislation and privateer actions. Action suggestions in intel UI.
testing-plan: Verify intel enables actions. Test route matching suggestions. Verify price calculations. Test links to other systems.
todos: Design action integration with other systems
unknowns: How automatic vs manual actions are
